Voltek Sales Management System

—

Sales Commission Dashboard

Commission per sale is set automatically by the salesperson's running number of counted sales: 1st–30th = RM100, 31st–60th = RM150, 61st onward = RM200. A sale is counted once the Transfer Slip (RM 1k Booking) step is done within the salesperson's contract period, and confirmed when OR Slip (80%) is done. Bookings made after a contract expires are not counted until the contract is renewed.
